about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about Dujiao-Next
about.introduction: Dujiao-Next is a professional online studio dedicated to providing high-quality products and services to our customers. Innovation, professionalism, and efficiency are our core values, and we constantly pursue excellence to create value for our customers.
about.contactText: If you have any questions about our products or services, please feel free to contact us via:

twofa.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
twofa.subtitle: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app such as Google Authenticator or 1Password.
twofa.notEnabledHint: When enabled, you will need to enter a 6-digit code from your authenticator in addition to your password at sign-in.
twofa.setupStep1: Step 1: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually.
twofa.setupStep2: Step 2: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator to confirm.
twofa.enableFailed: Could not enable 2FA — please verify the code
twofa.disableHint: Disabling 2FA reduces account security. Enter your current code or an unused recovery code to confirm.
twofa.disableFailed: Could not disable, please verify your input
twofa.regenerateHint: Regenerating invalidates all old recovery codes — store the new ones safely.
twofa.regenerateSuccess: New recovery codes generated — please save them safely
twofa.regenerateFailed: Generation failed, please verify the code
twofa.recoveryWarning: Each recovery code can only be used once. Store these codes in a safe place — you will not be able to view them again after closing this dialog.

dashboard.title: Reseller Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review storefront status, balances, and recent reseller sales orders.
dashboard.inactiveDescription: Submit an application or wait for review before using the full console.
dashboard.benefit1: Build your own storefront on a dedicated domain
dashboard.benefit2: Set custom product pricing and earn the margin
dashboard.benefit3: Track sales orders and settlement in real time

setup.title: Storefront launch checklist
setup.description: Complete domain, site, product, and first-order setup so the reseller storefront is ready to operate.
setup.primaryDomainEmpty: Add and verify an accessible domain
setup.siteBrandDescription: Configure site name, logo, announcement, and support entry
setup.productRulesDescription: Adjust listing scope and reseller pricing rules

apply.title: Reseller Application
apply.description: Check access status and submit an application when available.
apply.unavailableDescription: If access is active, use the other reseller modules directly.

domains.title: Domain Management
domains.description: Manage system and custom reseller domains with review and verification status.
domains.emptyDescription: System subdomains are assigned by administrators. Custom domains can also be submitted.
domains.workspaceDescription: Review the primary domain, system subdomain, and custom domain availability in one place.
domains.primaryDescription: Visitors enter your reseller storefront through the primary domain.
domains.reviewDescription: Domains waiting for review or verification.
domains.systemAssignedDesc: This domain is assigned by an administrator and can be used to access your storefront.
domains.systemWaitingDesc: No system subdomain has been assigned yet. Contact an administrator to set a branded prefix.
domains.systemEmptyDescription: An administrator can assign a system subdomain such as hello.example.com for your default branded entry.
domains.customDescription: Custom domains require verification and review after submission.
domains.customEmptyDescription: No custom domains yet. Submit a domain with DNS ready above.
domains.submitCustomDesc: Submit your own branded domain. It can become primary after verification.
domains.submitDisabledDesc: Your reseller profile is not active yet, so custom domains cannot be submitted.
domains.verifyDesc: A custom domain enters pending review after submission: first point its DNS (CNAME/A record) to the platform, then wait for manual review by the platform — it goes live once verified.

site.title: Store Settings
site.description: Configure reseller storefront name, announcements, support, navigation, and theme basics.

cards.brandDescription: The site name, logo, and favicon shape the first impression of the reseller storefront.
cards.supportDescription: Configure at least one support channel to handle orders and after-sales questions.
cards.domainDescription: After branding is ready, use the primary domain to check navigation, announcements, and mobile display.

readiness.title: Setup progress
readiness.description: Complete branding and support first, then fill in SEO, announcements, footer links, and navigation.

products.title: Product Pricing
products.description: Control storefront visibility and maintain product or SKU pricing rules.
products.focusDescription: Start with high-converting products, then refine SKU pricing and visibility rules.

cards.defaultMarkupDescription: Products without individual rules use the default markup to generate reseller prices.
cards.maxMarkupDescription: A cap of 0 means unlimited; pricing above the admin limit will be rejected.
cards.storefrontDescription: Hidden products stay out of reseller listings; checkout validation still blocks abnormal prices.

hints.listingDescription: Hide products or SKUs that should not be sold through the reseller storefront.
hints.pricingDescription: Combine inherited markup, percent markup, fixed markup, and fixed price rules as needed.
hints.skuDescription: Prioritize detailed rules for high-value or high-stock SKUs.

finance.title: Finance Overview
finance.description: Review currency balances, locked amounts, and settlement status.
finance.settlementHint: Locked amounts unlock to available balance after the confirmation window; negative balances come from refund deductions and are offset by later profit.

ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.description: Filter reseller ledger movements by type and status.

withdraws.title: Withdrawals
withdraws.description: Submit withdrawal requests and track processing status.

orders.title: Sales Orders
orders.description: Review reseller storefront orders, revenue, and neutral profit status.
orders.profitHelp: Credited = profit added to balance; Pending = within the confirmation window, credited after settlement; Unavailable = order canceled/refunded or not profit-eligible.

orderDetail.description: Review order amounts, profit snapshot, and item lines.
